query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a white ribbed tank top layered under an unbuttoned blue plaid shirt, photographed from the chest up. The individual's face is partially visible at the top of the frame, showing a beard and mustache. The lighting falls across the face and upper chest, creating warm highlights against darker shadow areas. Fine linear scratches overlay the entire image surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred portrait of a person in a white ribbed tank top and unbuttoned blue plaid shirt, their bearded face streaked with smeared horizontal light trails that dissolve facial features into abstract movement. Heavy film grain and scratch artifacts texture the entire surface, while muted, desaturated tones and oppressive shadows create an atmosphere of unease and visual decay. The chest and shoulder emerge from darkness only to be swallowed again by the blur, producing a distressed, melancholic portrait where identity threatens to unravel.
